description: Create typed React Query hooks in each app that wrap the existing api-client methods. These hooks will be consumed by pages instead of inline mock data. Each app gets a hooks/useApi.ts (or similar) file exporting typed query/mutation hooks.
steps: In apps/quantai/src/hooks/, create useConversations.ts that calls apiClient.listConversations() and useChat.ts that wraps apiClient.chat() as a mutation with optimistic update. Use useQuery/useMutation from @tanstack/react-query directly (not the factory from @quant/api-client since the app api-clients have different response shapes).

In apps/quantchat/src/hooks/, update useChat.ts to use apiClient.getConversations() for the list and apiClient.getMessages(conversationId) for chat messages instead of mock data. Add useSendMessage mutation wrapping apiClient.sendMessage().
In apps/quantmail/src/hooks/, create useInbox.ts that calls apiClient methods for listEmails, searchEmails with useQuery and useInfiniteQuery for pagination.
In apps/quantedits/src/hooks/, create useProjects.ts, useTemplates.ts, useAssets.ts wrapping apiClient.listProjects(), apiClient.listTemplates(), apiClient.listAssets() etc.
In apps/quantmax/src/hooks/, create useFeed.ts (replacing mock generateVideos), useMatching.ts, useMatches.ts, useLive.ts wrapping the relevant apiClient methods.

In apps/quantneon/src/hooks/, update useFeed.ts to call apiClient.getFeed(page) instead of generateMockPosts. Create useStories.ts, useReels.ts, useProfile.ts, useExplore.ts wrapping respective apiClient methods.
In apps/quantube/src/hooks/, create useVideos.ts wrapping apiClient.getVideos(params), apiClient.getTrending(), apiClient.getVideo(id). Create useComments.ts for video comments.
All hooks should handle loading, error, and empty states by returning standard { data, isLoading, error, refetch } from useQuery. Infinite scroll hooks use useInfiniteQuery with getNextPageParam.
Run pnpm typecheck to verify all new hooks are type-safe
acceptance_criteria: Each app has typed hooks that wrap its api-client.ts methods using @tanstack/react-query
Hooks return standard React Query state (data, isLoading, error, refetch) - no mock data generators
pnpm typecheck passes across all apps
